fields.label: Detailed Job Description
fields.value:
We are looking for an experienced Senior Cloud Infrastructure Engineer to join our rapidly scaling backend team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining robust Kubernetes clusters across AWS and Azure environments. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Infrastructure as Code (specifically Terraform and Pulumi) and a strong background in automating deployment pipelines via GitHub Actions.

You will collaborate closely with our product and security teams to ensure all cloud resources are provisioned securely and in compliance with SOC2 standards. We expect candidates to have at least 5 years of production-level experience managing containerized workloads and setting up advanced monitoring dashboards using Datadog and Prometheus. Experience migrating legacy monolithic applications into microservices architectures is highly preferred.

This is a long-term position with the opportunity to transition into a full-time lead role after the initial 12-month contract period concludes. If you are passionate about building scalable, resilient systems and enjoy mentoring junior DevOps engineers, we encourage you to apply today!

options.text: I confirm that all information provided is accurate and includes recruiter and prime vendor details.
